body.title: store_memory bg-job hallucination fix
body.result: Fixed _bg_reason() to execute tool calls from LLM output. Prevents hallucinated store_memory where Igor fabricates tool_response blocks without persisting. Tool result written to ring_memory. 555 tests pass.
body.description: store_memory calls in bg-job LLM context produce hallucinated stored responses — nothing persists to DB. Igor thinks he stored but write never happens. Breaks self-training loop. Investigate bg-job tool dispatch vs foreground and fix.
